subject: LIGO/Virgo/KAGRA S230712a: Retraction of GW compact binary merger candidate
submitter: Md Arif Shaikh at Seoul National University <md.shaikh@ligo.org>
body:
The LIGO Scientific Collaboration, the Virgo Collaboration, and the KAGRA Collaboration report:
The trigger S2307012a is no longer considered to be a candidate of interest. Looking at the data, pipeline experts consider this trigger is not consistent with a signal.
